publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-02-01 18:04:38 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: {comma separted list of material formats; end with period.}
did.abstract: Professional papers and reviews, newspaper clippings, correpondence, and programs for various plays, including Miss Evers' Boys, a play based on the notorious Tuskegee Syphilis Study in the African American male.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Theatre Arts and Director of the Cornell Center for Theatre Arts.

emph.ref: Series II. Newspaper Articles and Reviews
Series III. Programs and Study Guides
Series V. Scripts, Reviews, & Press Packets
Series VIII. Miss Evers' Boys Files

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: David Feldshuh papers, #14-24-3458. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Professional papers and reviews, newspaper clippings, correspondence, and programs for various plays, including Miss Evers' Boys, a play based on the notorious Tuskegee Syphilis Study on the African American male; also drafts of his speech at the Inauguration of David Skorton as president of Cornell University, 2006.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 4-6 (Inauguration speech drafts and Miss Evers' Boys files) restricted to permission of the donor.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/50075

Tuskegee Syphilis Study.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letter from director Sam Gold.

did.unittitle: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
Mass: children staging, street chorus, reviews and articles
Mass: celebrant, religion, short talk throughs
Mass: projections, staging, character agenda/character and song
Mass: budget, liturgical choir, design (k Goetz), program notes
Mass: viewpoints/POV, music/soloists, research, production meetings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All RPTA Audition files include comp photos and evaluation sheets, resumes and contact information

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program, John Guare's "The Loveliest Afternoon of the Year and a Day For Surprises", component of the Exploration Series

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: RPTA Presentations, "Stop Date Rape", abbreviated scripts, press releases, human relations training, etc.

did.unittitle: Series VIII. Miss Evers' Boys Files

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: American Conservatory, Alley Theatre, Madison Rep. Theatre, Geraldine R. Dodge Thatre Program, and typed script
